title: AN ACT APPROPRIATING FUNDS FOR THE OPERATION OF THE GOVERNMENT OF THE REPUBLIC OF THE PHILIPPINES DURING THE PERIOD FROM JULY FIRST, NINETEEN HUNDRED SEVENTY TO JUNE THIRTIETH, NINETEEN HUNDRED SEVENTY-ONE AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES.

chunks.text:
H. No. 1230 / 66 OG No. 35, 8049 (August 31, 1970)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6130, July 25, 1970 ]

AN ACT APPROPRIATING FUNDS FOR THE OPERATION OF THE GOVERNMENT OF THE REPUBLIC OF THE PHILIPPINES DURING THE PERIOD FROM JULY FIRST, NINETEEN HUNDRED SEVENTY TO JUNE THIRTIETH, NINETEEN HUNDRED SEVENTY-ONE AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES.

Approved, July 25, 1970.

(Published in Separate Volume)
